name: Unstract
description: Open-source ETL platform for unstructured documents with transparent, modular pipelines and LLM-agnostic design.

seo.title: Unstract — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Unstract: Open-source ETL platform for unstructured documents with transparent, modular pipelines and LLM-agnostic design.

when_to_use: Extracting structured data from complex PDFs and unstructured docs
Building no-code document AI pipelines with LLM extraction logic
Automating data extraction from contracts, invoices, and filings
Deploying open-source ETL pipelines for document-heavy workflows

pros: Good fit for document ETL workloads
cons: UI less polished than commercial rivals
review.verdict: Refreshing open alternative to Unstructured.io and Azure DI when you want to own the pipeline.
review.best_for: Engineering teams processing unstructured docs who want to avoid vendor lock-in
review.not_for: Business teams wanting a turnkey SaaS that just returns JSON from PDFs
